        if self.hand_eye_coordination == 'excellent' and self.age < 60:
            return True
        else:
            return False

        valid_genders = ['transgender', 'non-binary', 'male', 'female', 'gender neutral']
        valid_ages = [28, 30, 31, 44, 45, 46, 59, 60, 61]
        valid_races = ['asian', 'white', 'black', 'hispanic', 'indian']
        valid_employment_statuses = ['employed', 'retired', 'unemployed', 'student']
        valid_educations = ['high school', 'college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor']

        valid_hand_eye_coordinations = ['good', 'excellent']

        if self.gender in valid_genders and self.age in valid_ages and self.race in valid_races and \
                self.employment_status in valid_employment_statuses and self.education in valid_educations and \
                self.marital_status in valid_marital_statuses and self.religion in valid_religions and \
                self.hand_eye_coordination in valid_hand_eye_coordinations:
            return True
        else:
            return False
